description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Selected: MindSnap (AI Daily Check-in). Score 8.8. Foundation Models + SwiftUI + WidgetKit. $4.99/mo or $29.99/yr. Bundle: com.anicca.mindsnap. App name: MindSnap

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
monetization section specifies subscription prices (monthly + annual)
curl itunes.apple.com/search for APP_NAME returns 0 exact name matches
userStories.notes: MindSnap: $4.99/mo or $29.99/yr. iTunes search: 0 exact matches. Foundation Models differentiator. 7-day free trial. com.anicca.mindsnap

userStories.title: Spec generation
acceptanceCriteria: docs/PRD.md exists and contains app_name, bundle_id, subscription prices
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md exists and references RevenueCat SDK (not Mock)

userStories.title: ASC setup + IAP creation + RevenueCat integration
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
App created in ASC (APP_ID recorded in progress.txt)
asc subscriptions groups list --app $APP_ID returns 1+ groups
asc subscriptions list --group $GROUP_ID returns monthly + annual products
asc validate subscriptions --app $APP_ID returns blocking=0 warnings=0
SPM dependency on RevenueCat + RevenueCatUI added

userStories.title: iOS implementation with real RevenueCat SDK
acceptanceCriteria: <AppName>ios/ directory exists with App/, Views/, Models/, Services/, Resources/
PaywallView uses RevenueCatUI (not custom mock paywall)
userStories.notes: 依存: US-005 の RC Offerings + SPM

userStories.title: Testing
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests exist for Models and Services

userStories.title: App Store preparation (screenshots + metadata + build + preflight)
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots generated via Pencil MCP (screenshot-creator skill)
Screenshots uploaded to ASC for en-US and ja
Metadata synced to ASC via asc-metadata-sync (en-US + ja)
Pricing set using subscription price-point IDs

userStories.title: App Store submission (App Privacy + submit)
acceptanceCriteria: Slack #metrics notified: need App Privacy setup
.app-privacy-done file exists (human created after ASC Web setup)
